lines: Oi E.D.D.I.E. Whats this thing right here?
That appears to be one of the several broken pieces that  *YOU*  broke of from our IID.
Soo should I take this with me?
Would you like to get rid of everyone who shouldnt be onboard at once?
Of course yeah. What should I do with them then?
Collect every one you can find and bring them to me to the ships engine room on the final level. There I will repair our ship's IID and send everyone back home.
Okay great, and then its back to bussiness as usual?
Indeed, but make sure too check everywhere you can think of and grab every piece you can find.
Or we might become space junk...
ohhhh... I'll do my best then
Well... There's a first time for everything sir.
